metadata.title: Yamparala Rahul - Design Engineer
metadata.description: Design Engineer for Web3, B2B & Healthcare. 5.2 years of experience.

hero.name: Yamparala Rahul
hero.bio: UX Designer turned Design Engineer. I do the best I can, designing and building products in web3.

footer.heading: Let's know each other!
footer.description: Let's discuss how I can be a good fit with the team and drive growth.
footer.quote: "Quality means doing it right when no one is looking"

mini.bio1: Yamparala Rahul is a Design Engineer based in India with 5.2 years of experience. He currently works at {company} building products in web3.
mini.bio2: He joined Equicom Technologies in 2025 after revamping {pubkey}'s UI on Solana. Before that, he spent 2.4 years at {entytle} simplifying B2B SaaS, and 2 years at {synclo} designing healthcare systems. He founded Yamparala.in in 2019.
mini.bio3: Member of {islandDAO}. Contributor at {superteam}. {greedAcademy} graduate. Certified by Google and IBM.
